title: nervilia subintegra
intro: Nervilia subintegra, also known as the yellow bog orchid or yellow marsh orchid, is a species of orchid found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nervilia subintegra include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Nervilia subintegra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
